scenarios.description: clone() returns a distinct Document instance with cloned outputSettings and parser
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document is not same instance as original; returned.outputSettings != original.outputSettings and returned.parser != original.parser; all other fields (location, quirksMode, childNodes, attributes) are equal in value

scenarios.description: modifying the clone's outputSettings does not affect original Document
scenarios.expectedResult: after clone, changing cloned.outputSettings.prettyPrint(false) leaves original.outputSettings.prettyPrint() == true
